title: Front Office Manager - Radisson India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Radisson India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Radisson India! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Radisson India:
Radisson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Radisson India!
